_comment: Local-only config for agent feature-testing. Copy this file to
`agent-target.local.json` and fill in the real values. The .local
variant is gitignored so per-machine deploy info doesn't leak into
Agents running in this repo should read agent-target.local.json
BEFORE asking the user 'what's your test cluster?' or 'where's your
ssh key?'. Missing file → fall back to asking; never write back to

web._note: Used by agents that want to curl the live API or click through to /settings/* in a browser.

cli._note: Path (relative to repo root) of the kuso CLI binary the agent should drive. Per CLAUDE.md, agents should prefer the CLI over raw kubectl.

test._note: A real project+service the agent can poke at when smoke-testing a change. Pick something disposable — agents may trigger redeploys, env changes, etc. against this.
